headline: Nanox Starts 2 Collaborations to Deploy Nanox.ARC in U.S.
summary: By Karen Roman Nano-X Imaging Ltd. (Nasdaq: NNOX) said it started two new collaborations to deploy its digital tomosynthesis system Nanox.ARC across the U.S. The first partnership aims to use 12 Nanox.ARC with Integrity Medical Service in Colorado, Wyoming and the western parts of Kansas and Nebraska, the company stated. headline: Casey’s General Stores Joining S&P 500 This Week
summary: Casey’s General Stores  the Iowa-based convenience store chain, will replace medical technology company  Hologic  in the S&P 500 before trading opens on Thursday, S&P Dow Jones Indices said late Monday.  Hologic is being acquired by affiliates of  Blackstone  and TPG Global in a deal expected to be completed on or about Tuesday.  Barron’s reported in October that Blackstone and TPG were in advanced talks to acquire the medical device maker, although the companies declined to confirm the talks.

headline: Casey's General Stores Set to Join S&P 500; DigitalOcean Holdings to Join S&P MidCap 400; Broadstone Net Lease to Join S&P SmallCap 600
summary: S&P MidCap 400 constituent Casey's General Stores Inc. (NASD: CASY) will replace Hologic Inc. (NASD: HOLX) in the S&P 500, S&P SmallCap 600 constituent DigitalOcean Holdings Inc. (NYSE: DOCN) will replace Casey's General Stores in the S&P MidCap 400, and Broadstone Net Lease Inc. (NYSE: BNL) will replace DigitalOcean Holdings in the S&P SmallCap 600 effective prior to the opening of trading on Thursday, April 9.
